name: AeroVironment, Inc.
description: AeroVironment, Inc. is a global leader in intelligent, multi-domain robotic systems, serving defense, government, and commercial customers. The company specializes in the design, development, and production of unmanned aircraft systems (UAS), tactical missile systems, and unmanned ground vehicles. Its innovative solutions provide actionable intelligence and connectivity to help customers achieve mission success. AeroVironment is renowned for its pioneering work in high-altitude pseudo-satellites and small UAS, such as the Raven and Switchblade systems, which are widely utilized by the U.S. Department of Defense and international allies.
